name: ARMOR young physically active donor FMT resilient aging trial
summary: Active-not-recruiting randomized phase 1 study of lyophilized FMT capsules from young physically active donors versus placebo in community-dwelling adults aged 65 to 84 years, with strength, functional autonomy, safety, metabolic, microbiome, cognitive, and psychological outcomes.

trial_details.expected_results_window: The registry record lists Sep. 30, 2027 as the study end date and had no posted results as of Jun. 3, 2026.
trial_details.horizon_note: Not a May 2026 result, but the outcomes include strength, functional autonomy, safety, metabolic, microbiome, cognitive, and psychological measures.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results could test whether young-donor FMT affects functional aging-related readouts in older adults.
